examples:
Command Example
Context Example
Human Readable Output
30. Get a list processes running on an endpoint
Returns a list of processes running on the endpoint.
Base Command
cb-process-list
Input
name: cb-process-list

outputs.description: Unique command identifier. CbLiveResponse.Commands.CommandName The command name.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.CbCommandID

outputs.description: The command Status ('pending', 'in progress', 'complete', 'error', 'canceled'). CbLiveResponse.Commands.CommandCompletionTime The command completion time (0 if not complete).
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.Status

outputs.description: Process ID. CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.CreateTime The creation time of the process in Unix time.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.ProcessID

outputs.description: The process guid of the process. CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.Path The execution path of the process.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.ProcessGuid

outputs.description: The Security Identifier (SID) of the default process token. CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.Username The username of the default process token.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.SecurityIdentifier

outputs.description: The pid (process id ) of the parent. CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.ParentGuid The process guid of the parent process.
outputs.name: CbLiveResponse.Commands.Processes.Parent

source_title: VMware Carbon Black EDR (Live Response API)
